name: apun-hi-bhagwan-hai
description: Production-ready Fastify TypeScript monorepo with REST, gRPC, Prisma, Swagger docs, deployment templates, and strict Git quality gates.

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/domain && npm run build -w packages/config && npm run build -w packages/contracts && npm run build -w packages/application && npm run build -w packages/infrastructure && npm run build -w apps/api
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w packages/domain && npm run build -w packages/config && npm run build -w packages/contracts && npm run build -w packages/application && npm run build -w packages/infrastructure
scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && npm run dev -w apps/api
scripts.commit:ready: npm run commit:status && npm run commit:check
scripts.scan: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.scan:quick: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test
scripts.deps:check: npm run deps:audit && npm run deps:outdated
